products.name: Custom Fabrication
products.descriptor: Custom tight-tolerance optical component fabrication in UV/visible/IR materials

evidence.snippet:
**CUSTOM FABRICATION
**
=========================
Our custom fabrication capabilities include the manufacture of tight-tolerance optics of all kinds, utilizing a full range of ultraviolet, visible, and infrared materials. In addition to providing our standard, off-the-shelf products, we take delicate, difficult to work with optical materials and fabricate functional components that meet your exacting specifications.
##### ITAR REGISTERED – ISO 9001:2015 REGISTERED – DFARS/NIST COMPLIANT – MADE IN THE USA

unresolved_questions: All 15 prioritized products are confirmed from the homepage shop navigation menu, but all individual product category pages (e.g. /product-category/sapphire-domes, /product-category/sapphire-lenses, etc.) were skipped_budget and not fetched. Per-SKU part numbers, size variants, and pricing tiers within each family are therefore unknown. The three fetched pages (homepage, custom-fabrication, about) provide names and high-level context only.
NDAA compliance is set to not_disclosed for all products: the site claims DFARS/NIST compliance and Made in USA but makes no explicit NDAA Section 848/889 product-level claim.
Sapphire Wafer Carriers and Sapphire Precision Balls appear targeted at semiconductor/industrial markets; their UXV supply-chain relevance is indirect.
